title: Celestite
body:
# Celestite
**An "old-school" Minecraft mod by startFX.**

Adds one new material : Celestite and bunch of stuff related to it.
For example, with Celestite, you can craft tools that are even better than Netherite ones !
You can also craft some other utility blocks like the Celestial Vault, a storage block that has 150 storage slots, which is equivalent to 11+ chests. In one single block.
Although Celestite is pretty rare (in the End), with it, you can do some pretty OP stuff.
Hope you'll enjoy my first ever Minecraft mod !

**Naturally Spawning Celestite**

![Naturally Spawning Celestite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc2dc35c10181cc579698f923cf67f6e03bbb85f.png)

**Celestite Toolset**

![Celestite Toolset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de73d57e0d1b1167409b9ffa2b3dde18dd813292.png)

**Celestite Block**

![Celestite Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95cec697f466ba4e49a86336ea342ba788c38f7e.png)

**Reinforced Celestite & Celestial Vault**

![Reinforced Celestite & Celestial Vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a647da3adb6c558684651874261c2e09724667a.png)

![Brewing Starlight Ascention Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e654fc7e644d7a1457a94da84caea1ef5383795.png)
